current_work_unit.title: LLM Caller CLI Module Integration
current_work_unit.objective: Copy and integrate the llm_caller_cli module from ../forwork/modules/llm_caller_cli into this project as a standalone module. The module contains 12 Python source files across 4 subdirectories (src/core, src/providers, src/config, src/models), 13 test files with 241 tests, and 3,900 lines of code. It provides LLM integration with OpenAI, Anthropic, and LM Studio.
